accumulated-year.desc: You completed a habit 365 times! Sure, there were gaps, weeks of laziness, and existential crises... but hey, mathematically, it adds up to a whole year!
accumulated-year.title: A Year... Sort Of

compact-calendar.desc: Boom! You have switched your calendar to a compact view. Maximum density, zero distraction.
compact-calendar.title: Space Saver

diane-morning-log.desc: “Diane, 7:30 AM...” You've written a note before 9:00. Grab a damn good cup of coffee and a donut — Agent Cooper would definitely approve of your morning routine!
diane-morning-log.title: Good Morning, Diane

first-archive.desc: Out of sight, but not forgotten. You have successfully archived your very first habit.
first-archive.title: Clean Slate

first-note.desc: You have just created your very first note. Keep capturing your thoughts.
first-note.title: First Note

fresh-start.desc: Welcome aboard! You have just created your very first habit. Let’s make it stick.
fresh-start.title: Fresh Start

gotham-protector.desc: You wrote a note after 00:00. What's keeping you awake? Are you protecting Gotham, or just overthinking again?
gotham-protector.title: The Dark Knight

gravity-falls-journal.desc: You are actively writing down your thoughts and anomalies. Somewhere in Oregon, Dipper Pines is desperately trying to find your notebook to solve the mysteries of your life!
gravity-falls-journal.title: Journal #4

habit-vacation-over.desc: You've returned to your habit after a gap of 21+ days. Just a friendly reminder: the rule was to stick with it for 21 days straight to form a habit, not to take a 3-week vacation from it! But hey, welcome back!
habit-vacation-over.title: Habit Formation

ill-be-back.desc: You've archived 5 habits — because why actually do them when you can just collect?
ill-be-back.title: I'll Be Back

main-quest-abandoned.desc: The world is ending, Alduin is here, but you've ignored this habit for 7 days straight. Classic Dragonborn behavior. Let's guess, you went to chase butterflies instead?
main-quest-abandoned.title: The Dragonborn Can Wait

new-years-resolution.desc: You broke the curse! Started and completed a habit on January 1st while everyone else is still asleep.
new-years-resolution.title: New Year, New Me

not-twitter-approved.desc: Kudos! You've crafted a note longer than 140 characters. Back in the day, this would never fit in a tweet, but you are free from those ancient limits now. Write on!
not-twitter-approved.title: Not Twitter-Approved

overachiever-day.desc: Wow, three habits in one day! Who knew you had this much free time? Procrastination looks good on you!
overachiever-day.title: Overachiever of the Day!

perfect-day.desc: You've got 3 or more habits, and you've accomplished every single one!
perfect-day.title: Perfect Day!

perfect-year.desc: 365 days of absolute discipline. You started on January 1st and didn’t miss a single day all year round.
perfect-year.title: Calendar Conqueror

storage_info.desc: Read the data storage information to know how your habits are saved.
storage_info.title: Data Guardian

time-traveler.desc: You've officially mastered the art of pretending to be productive — five times!
time-traveler.title: I Swear I Did It!

tolstoy-mode.desc: Impressive! The total character count in your notes could give Leo Tolstoy a run for his money.
tolstoy-mode.title: War and Peace and More

list.emptyDesc: Unlock rare achievements by using the app regularly!

notification.desc:
It seems that new achievements have been unlocked!
You can check them in the achievements section.
notification.title: Achievement unlocked!

errorBoundary.desc: Try reloading. If it doesn’t help, reset the app data (your progress will be saved as a backup).

dialogs.resetConfirm: Backup your data and reset the app?

errorBoundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong

update.text: Please click the reload button to sync the latest features.
update.title: Update Ready!

dialogs.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this habit?
dialogs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this habit? Deleted data cannot be recovered.
dialogs.restoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this habit?

form.colorDesc: Dots mark colors already in use. You can still reuse them.
form.frequencyDesc: Times per day you want to repeat this habit.
form.iconDesc: Faded icons are already in use. You can still reuse them.
form.orderDesc: The habit's position in your list.

list.emptyArchivedDesc: You can archive a habit by editing it.

stats.streakHistoryDesc: Shows streaks of 2 days or more
stats.title: Statistics

showDayNumbers.desc: Applies to the default calendar only
showDayNumbers.title: Show day numbers

showWeekdayNames.desc: Applies to the default calendar only
showWeekdayNames.title: Show weekday names

export.desc: Save a backup data to your device

dialogs.exportConfirm: Download backup file to your device?
dialogs.passwordPrompt: Optional: enter a password to encrypt the backup. Leave empty to export as plain JSON.

export.title: Export

import.desc: Upload your app data from a backup file

notifications.success: Data imported successfully! The application will now reload.
notifications.wrongPassword: Decryption failed. The password may be incorrect or the file is corrupted.

import.title: Import

dialogs.passwordPrompt: This backup is encrypted. Enter the password to decrypt it:

dialogs.confirm:
Are you sure you want to delete all application data?

This includes:
- All your habits
- All achievements
- All diary entries

This action cannot be undone!

notifications.success: All data has been successfully removed. The application will now reload.

dataManagement.desc: Backup, restore, or clear app data

storage.description: How and where your habit data is stored
storage.title: Data Storage

dataManagement.title: Data Management

feedback.desc: Report bugs or suggest new features
feedback.title: Report an Issue

gitHub.desc: View or contribute to the project
gitHub.title: GitHub Repository

dialogs.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this note(s)?

list.emptyDesc: Add your first note to start tracking your progress and thoughts.

tags.emptyDesc: To create a tag, simply add a hashtag (#) before any word while writing a note.

storageInfo.intro: The app stores all data directly on your device.
storageInfo.notice: Backup regularly. The backup is a tiny JSON file you can move to any device.
storageInfo.privacy: Total privacy: no remote servers, no cloud sync, and no trackers. Your data is strictly yours.
storageInfo.pwa: For better safety, install this app on your home screen. Installed PWA storage is protected by the OS and rarely cleared automatically.
storageInfo.warning: If you use it through a regular browser, clearing history or cache will erase your habits.

welcome.description: A lightweight assistant featuring visual statistics, streak achievements, and a built-in progress journal.

chromeNudge.text:
Native installation is supported in Chromium-based browsers.
Please open this app in Google Chrome to install it on your device.
chromeNudge.title: Google Chrome Required

ios.steps: Open this page in Safari, tap the 'Share' icon in your browser menu, and select 'Add to Home Screen'.
ios.title: Install on iOS

deck.loadError: Your cards could not be loaded.

createCard.atomicNote: The card and both goals are created together. A failed save leaves no partial data.
createCard.saveError: The card was not created. Your entries are still here; please try again.
createCard.title: New running card

card.title: Name this loop card
card.description: Use a name you will recognize in today's six slots.

longTerm.title: Set a long-term direction
longTerm.description: This records direction without punishment or streak pressure.

stage.title: Set the first stage
stage.description: Use a smaller distance you can complete before the long-term goal.

review.title: Check this loop card
review.description: Confirm the card and both quantity goals before creating them.

error.dataNotice: This page does not clear local browser data.
error.description: The application shell encountered a problem. Reload it or inspect the technical details.
error.title: This page cannot open right now

history.emptyDescription: After a daily outcome is saved, action records will appear here by local date.

home.calendarDescription: A date receives a result marker only after a real action record exists.
home.goalsDescription: Once cards and goals exist, progress calculated from action records will appear here.
home.sceneDescription: The shell is ready. Real outcome scenes arrive after the save loop is connected.
home.sceneTitle: Make repeated action leave a visible trail

settings.dataDescription: The first stage has no account or cloud sync. Future business data stays in this browser.
settings.dataUnavailable: 3.0 import, export, and reset arrive after the data model is stable. Old test data is not touched.
settings.license: The project uses AGPL-3.0 and is based on DoHabit.

pwaStatus.BROWSER_ONLY: Use the browser menu to install, or use a browser with an install prompt.
pwaStatus.CAN_INSTALL: This browser can install the app directly.
pwaStatus.INSTALLED: The app is running in its own window.
pwaStatus.IOS_MANUAL: Use Add to Home Screen in Safari.

settings.projectSourcePending: The project repository will be public before release.
settings.reduceMotionDescription: Disable non-essential page and component motion.

today.slotsDescription: M3–M4 will connect real cards, today's draft, batch saving, and playback.
today.viewportDescription: This reserves real playback space without showing fake animation or outcomes.
